channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 3.0.0-rc2 2019-10-13T14:51:39Z Features/Updates: Fix padding issue for #wb-srch-sub Fix padding issue for Date Modified block PHPCS corrections for WxT Library Proper dependencies for Webform resolving missing revision Addition of WxT Sub Profile Generator for Drupal Console Addition of WxT Lightning Update Manager for Drupal Console Minor improvements to migration Properly namespace modules with expanded syntax Updates entity_reference_revisions, paragraphs, and simple_sitemap Upgrade path:
